title: begonia oblanceolata
intro: Begonia oblanceolata, also known as the 'beauty leaf' or 'Chinese begonia', is a type of flowering plant native to Asia that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Begonia oblanceolata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
